name: aaai-compliance-checker
description: AAAI 2027 LaTeX formatting compliance checker — validates papers against AAAI Author Kit requirements for preamble, forbidden packages/commands, title/author format, section structure, figures/tables, citations, PDF-level checks, and submission-mode-specific rules.
author: HansonLegacy

skills.name: aaai-compliance-checker
skills.description: This skill should be used when the user wants to check AAAI format, verify LaTeX compliance, audit paper formatting, validate AAAI submission, or check if a paper follows AAAI 2027 Author Kit formatting and writing requirements.
